mapper.sql: select s.schedule_id, s.term_id, s.class_course_id, s.classroom_id, s.week_day, s.start_section, s.end_section, coalesce(c.classroom_name, s.classroom_name, s.classroom) as classroom, coalesce(c.classroom_name, s.classroom_name, s.classroom) as classroom_name, coalesce(c.building_name, s.building_name) as building_name, coalesce(c.campus_name, s.campus_name) as campus_name, s.weeks_text, s.weeks_json, s.status, s.create_by, s.create_time, s.update_by, s.update_time, s.remark from sc_course_schedule s left join sc_classroom c on c.classroom_id = s.classroom_id
mapper.insert: insert into sc_course_schedule(term_id, class_course_id, classroom_id, week_day, start_section, end_section, classroom, classroom_name, building_name, campus_name, weeks_text, weeks_json, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{termId}, #{classCourseId}, #{classroomId}, #{weekDay}, #{startSection}, #{endSection}, #{classroom}, #{classroomName}, #{buildingName}, #{campusName}, #{weeksText}, #{weeksJson}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update sc_course_schedule term_id = #{termId},class_course_id = #{classCourseId},classroom_id = #{classroomId},week_day = #{weekDay},start_section = #{startSection},end_section = #{endSection},classroom = #{classroom},classroom_name = #{classroomName},building_name = #{buildingName},campus_name = #{campusName},weeks_text = #{weeksText},weeks_json = #{weeksJson},status = #{status},update_by = #{updateBy},remark = #{remark},update_time = sysdate() where schedule_id = #{scheduleId}

update sc_course_schedule set classroom = #{classroom}, classroom_name = #{classroomName}, building_name = #{buildingName}, campus_name = #{campusName}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where classroom_id = #{classroomId}
mapper.delete: delete from sc_course_schedule where schedule_id in #{scheduleId}
